callReview.totalNote: total of 222 calls from Jan 1 to Oct 31

calls.summary: Daniel Foster called to check RAV4 availability at the local Sales Center and asked about a hybrid trim. Oscar confirmed two RAV4 units in stock, walked through features, and booked a test drive for Saturday morning. Daniel was thrilled and confirmed the appointment.

Priya Nair inquired about a certified pre-owned SUV she saw online and wanted to know about the certification warranty coverage. Lila reviewed the inspection details, matched her budget, and scheduled a test drive for the next afternoon. Priya was pleased with the smooth process.

Marcus Webb called the Service Center to book an oil change and multi-point inspection for his sedan. Rosey found an opening for Thursday and confirmed the standard maintenance package and pricing. Marcus was satisfied and set the service appointment.

New shopper Angela Ruiz called to schedule a visit and test drive a RAV4, mentioning she also had a trade-in to appraise. Mary collected her full contact details, current vehicle info, and finance prequalification interest, then booked the test drive for Friday. Angela appreciated the thorough intake and confirmed her appointment.

Kevin Tan asked about the electric car inventory and range on a specific EV model. Lee explained charging options and the EV buyers guide, then scheduled a test drive for the weekend. Kevin was engaged and confirmed.

Sandra Mills called about finance prequalification and whether her trade-in could cover the down payment. Sue explained the soft-pull prequalification process and APR tiers but Sandra wanted to think it over before visiting. No appointment was set on the call.

Robert Hayes wanted to test drive a Ford F-150 and compare it to a Silverado. Mike confirmed both trucks were on the lot and scheduled a test drive for Monday evening. Robert was satisfied with the plan.

Teresa Gomez called to sell her car and asked whether a trade-in on a certified pre-owned vehicle would get a better value. Jennifer explained the instant offer and appraisal steps but Teresa was frustrated the online quote was lower than expected. She said she'd call back after shopping around.

Paul Jenkins called about his vehicle protection plan and disputed what the extended coverage included. Rose reviewed the plan terms and deductible but Paul felt the roadside benefit was misrepresented at purchase. She opened a review ticket without full resolution.

Nicole Barrett called to dispute a charge on her financing statement she didn't recognize. Oscar located the account and explained the fee but Nicole remained unhappy and asked for a supervisor callback. The issue was escalated unresolved.

Greg Sullivan complained that his oil change appointment ran two hours over and the multi-point inspection was skipped. Lila apologized and offered to reschedule with a discount, but Greg was irritated by the wait. He declined to rebook on the call.

Monica Reyes called about a delivery delay on the vehicle she purchased last week. Lee checked the transport status but couldn't give a firm date, which upset Monica. She asked for a manager and hung up dissatisfied.

Brian Klein called to cancel a pending purchase agreement after finding a better deal elsewhere. Sue tried to retain him with an updated offer but Brian was firm and wanted the deposit refunded. The cancellation was processed with visible frustration.

Diane Hoffman called the Collision Center furious about a paint mismatch after post-accident repair. Mike apologized and offered to re-inspect the body work but Diane demanded a refund and threatened a complaint. The call ended tense and unresolved.

Aaron Blake called after hours to complain about a service billing error and left a message requesting an urgent callback. The call rolled to voicemail and no agent was available to assist. No resolution occurred on this call.

prompts.question: Is the customer trying to solve a specific problem?
prompts.answer: Yes. The caller is a new customer actively shopping for a reliable mid-size SUV and wants to schedule a test drive of the Toyota RAV4 to evaluate fit, features, and financing options before purchase.

prompts.question: What are the customer's expectations?
prompts.answer: The customer expects a smooth intake process, availability of a RAV4 in their budget range ($22K–$28K) at the local AutoNation sales center, and a confirmed test drive appointment within 2–3 days.

prompts.question: How could the agent handle the call better?
prompts.answer: Marcus should have captured the customer's email address for follow-up confirmations and digital materials, explained what to expect during the test drive visit (documentation, financing pre-qualification, vehicle features walkthrough), and offered a brief mention of AutoNation's Vehicle Protection Plans or extended warranty to build awareness for the in-person consultation.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling AutoNation. This is Marcus speaking. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi Marcus. I'm interested in scheduling a test drive. I've been looking at the Toyota RAV4 on your website.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great! You've made an excellent choice. The RAV4 is one of our most popular models. Before we schedule, I'd like to gather some information. What's your full name?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: It's Jennifer Zhao.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, Jennifer. And what's your approximate budget for the RAV4?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I'm looking to spend somewhere between $22,000 and $28,000. I'm interested in either new or certified pre-owned.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent. We have great options in that range. Are you in the Miami area, or which ZIP code are we working with?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes, I'm in Miami. My ZIP is 33139.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. That's in our service area. Jennifer, what's the best phone number to reach you?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you. I've noted that down. Now, when would be convenient for you to visit us for the test drive? We're open Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: How about Thursday afternoon? Something around 2 PM would work best for me.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thursday at 2 PM works perfectly. I'm scheduling you for Thursday, June 13th at 2 PM for a RAV4 test drive. You'll want to bring a valid driver's license and proof of insurance. Do you have any other questions?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: No, that sounds good. I'm excited to see the vehicle.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Wonderful, Jennifer. We're looking forward to seeing you Thursday at 2 PM. Your appointment is confirmed. Thank you for choosing AutoNation, and we'll see you soon!

callDetail.aiSummary: Jennifer Zhao, a new customer from Miami (ZIP 33139), called to schedule a test drive for a Toyota RAV4 with a budget of $22,000–$28,000. Agent Marcus Bell successfully captured her name, location, phone number, and confirmed an appointment for Thursday, June 13th at 2 PM. While Marcus provided clear directions and appointment details, he missed the opportunity to capture her email address for follow-up and did not set detailed expectations about the test drive visit (documentation, financing pre-qualification process, or vehicle features tour). No mention was made of AutoNation's Vehicle Protection Plans or financing pre-qualification options, which represent key upsell opportunities for new customers.

comment.author: Kyle Paklaian
comment.text: @Marcus — Nice structure on the intake call. You nailed the greeting, qualification (budget, vehicle, location), and appointment scheduling, which is the core win here. Two coaching points: (1) Always capture email in addition to phone — Jennifer will need follow-up confirmations and she may prefer digital delivery of inventory details or financing pre-qual links before Thursday. (2) Set clear expectations: tell her what docs to bring (DL + proof of insurance is good), but also walk her through what happens during the visit — 'You'll meet with our sales consultant, we'll do a quick pre-qual for financing options, and then we'll take the RAV4 out for a 15–20 minute test drive.' That context makes her visit feel less uncertain and increases show-up rate. Great effort overall!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling AutoNation, this is Marcus. How can I help you find your next vehicle today?
highlights: How can I help you find your next vehicle today?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, yeah, I'm looking at used SUVs. I saw a Toyota RAV4 on your site and wanted more info.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great choice, the RAV4 is one of our most popular models. Is this your first time shopping with AutoNation?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yeah, first time. A friend recommended you guys.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Welcome, we're glad to have you. Can I get your name so I can pull up the right inventory for you?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Sure, it's Danielle Reyes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Danielle. Are you leaning toward a Certified Pre-Owned RAV4, or open to standard used inventory too?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Certified pre-owned would be ideal, I want the warranty coverage. My budget's around $25,000.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. We have a couple of Certified Pre-Owned RAV4 XLE models in that $23,000 to $27,000 range with the multi-point inspection and coverage included.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: That sounds good. What would payments look like on something like that?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: With our financing, that typically lands in the $300 to $450 a month tier depending on your term and down payment. We also offer soft-pull prequalification so it won't affect your credit.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Oh nice, I'd like to get prequalified. And can I see the RAV4 in person?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. I'd recommend scheduling a test drive so you can get a feel for it. Are you available later this week?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Thursday morning would work for me.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let's do Thursday at 10 AM at our AutoNation Toyota Sales Center. Does that time work?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Yes, 10 AM Thursday is perfect.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, you're booked. What's the best phone number and email to send the confirmation and prequalification link?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: It's 555-٢٠٤-8817, and danielle.reyes@email.com.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, I've got your test drive set for Thursday at 10 AM and I'll email the prequalification link now. We'll have the Certified Pre-Owned RAV4 ready for you.
highlights: test drive set for Thursday at 10 AM

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Awesome, thank you so much Marcus.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: My pleasure, Danielle. See you Thursday, and thanks for choosing AutoNation!

aiSummary.summary: Danielle Reyes, a first-time AutoNation shopper, called about a used Toyota RAV4 she saw online and expressed interest in a Certified Pre-Owned model within a $25,000 budget. Agent Marcus recommended Certified Pre-Owned RAV4 XLE inventory in the $23,000–$27,000 range with included warranty coverage and multi-point inspection, and explained the $300–$450/month financing tier plus soft-pull prequalification. He scheduled a test drive for Thursday at 10 AM at the AutoNation Toyota Sales Center and captured her phone and email to send confirmation and the prequalification link.
keyPoints: New customer — first time shopping with AutoNation, referred by a friend
Interested in a Certified Pre-Owned Toyota RAV4 with warranty coverage
Budget around $25,000; agent matched CPO RAV4 XLE at $23K–$27K
Discussed $300–$450/month financing and offered soft-pull prequalification
Test drive booked for Thursday at 10 AM at the Toyota Sales Center
Captured phone number and email for confirmation and prequalification link

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi! This is AutoNation. Thanks for texting us about the Toyota RAV4. Are you looking to schedule a test drive at one of our Sales Centers?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Yes, I'm interested in the 2025 RAV4 I saw online. Do you have any in stock near me?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great! We have several RAV4s available. First, what's your price range—are you looking at vehicles under $30,000, or are you open to higher trims?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Probably around $25,000 to $35,000. I want a good balance of features.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Have you financed a vehicle before, or would you like to explore our AutoNation Finance options for prequalification?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: I've financed before. I'm good on that part. Just want to see the vehicle in person.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Understood! Are you looking for a New vehicle, Certified Pre-Owned, or are you open to either?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Certified Pre-Owned would be ideal if you have one in my price range.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent. Would tomorrow, Saturday, work for you to visit our AutoNation Sales Center, or would you prefer Monday or Tuesday?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Monday works better for me. What times are available?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great! We're open Monday from 9 AM to 8 PM. Would 2 PM work for you?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: 2 PM Monday is perfect. How do I know where to go?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set for Monday at 2 PM! Our Sales Center is at 1500 Auto Drive, San Jose. Ask for our Sales team when you arrive. Is this the best number to reach you with a reminder?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Yes, this number is fine.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect! We'll send you a confirmation text tomorrow. If you have any questions, call us at 877-936-2933. See you Monday!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi there, thanks for calling AutoNation. This is Marcus. How can I help you find your next vehicle today?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Yeah, hi. I'm looking for a used SUV, something reliable, you know, under thirty thousand.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Awesome. We've got some great options in that range. Are you looking to replace a vehicle you currently own, or is this your first SUV?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: I've got a sedan right now, but I want something bigger for my family. Kids need more space.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. A family SUV is a smart move. What brands are you most interested in? Toyota, Honda, Chevrolet?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: I like Toyota. I've heard good things about the RAV4. Do you guys have any in stock?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We absolutely do. The RAV4 is one of our most popular models and customers love them for family use. Have you had a chance to test drive an SUV before?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Not recently, no. I'd definitely want to see it in person and take it out.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. We can get you set up for a test drive. What area are you in? Are you closer to our Phoenix location or one of our other Arizona stores?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Phoenix, yeah. That's convenient for me.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. How about this Saturday, March fifteenth, at ten in the morning? We've got a couple of RAV4s available then.

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Saturday morning works great. Ten is perfect.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent. So I've got you down for a test drive this Saturday, March fifteenth at ten AM at our Phoenix AutoNation location. Your confirmation number is five five nine eight two, and we'll give you a quick call Friday to remind you. What's the best number to reach you on?

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: It's six zero two, five five five, eight one two four.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, six zero two, five five five, eight one two four. We'll call you Friday afternoon. Thanks for choosing AutoNation, and we look forward to seeing you Saturday!

transcript.speaker: consumer
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. See you then.

brandConversationRules: Intro + offer: Hi, I'm AutoNation's AI assistant helping you get a personalized vehicle quote and schedule a test drive — we're currently featuring select models with payments under $300/mo and Certified Pre-Owned specials; would you like to get started?

Qualify one question at a time: I'll ask a few quick questions one at a time — which vehicle type or model are you interested in (new, used, Certified Pre-Owned, or electric), your target monthly payment or price range, whether you'll be financing or paying cash, your ideal timeline to buy, and your ZIP code so I can confirm the nearest AutoNation store.

Estimate then book: Once I confirm we have inventory near your ZIP, I'll share a preliminary price or monthly-payment range based on what you shared, recommend meeting with a sales specialist for an exact, vehicle-specific quote, and propose a specific day and time for your test drive — you'll get a reminder text beforehand with a number to call.

qaPairs.question: Do you have used cars under $15,000?
qaPairs.answer: Yes, we carry a wide selection of budget-friendly pre-owned vehicles, and inventory changes daily by location — share your ZIP and I'll help you set up a test drive to see what's available near you.

qaPairs.question: What Certified Pre-Owned vehicles do you have?
qaPairs.answer: Our AutoNation Certified Pre-Owned vehicles are inspected and come with warranty coverage — let me know your preferred make or model and ZIP so I can book you a test drive with a specialist.

qaPairs.question: Can I find cars with payments under $300 a month?
qaPairs.answer: Yes, we promote vehicles in monthly-payment tiers including under $300, $300–$450, and $450+ — final payments depend on the vehicle and financing, so let's schedule a visit to get you exact numbers.

qaPairs.question: Do you sell electric cars?
qaPairs.answer: We have a dedicated EV inventory along with an EV Buyers Guide to help you choose — tell me your ZIP and I'll set up a test drive at the nearest store.

qaPairs.question: How much is a Toyota RAV4?
qaPairs.answer: The RAV4 is one of our most popular models and pricing varies by trim, year, and location, so I can't quote an exact figure here — let's book a test drive and a specialist will give you a precise quote.

qaPairs.question: Can you give me a price for a specific vehicle?
qaPairs.answer: Vehicle pricing is specific to the exact car and location, so the best way to get an accurate quote is to meet with a specialist — I'd be happy to schedule a test drive for you.

qaPairs.question: Do you offer financing?
qaPairs.answer: Yes, AutoNation Finance offers prequalification and loan options across credit tiers with no cost to apply — I can book you a consultation so a finance specialist can walk you through your options.

qaPairs.question: Can I get prequalified with bad credit?
qaPairs.answer: We work with customers across a range of credit tiers and offer a soft-pull prequalification — let's set up a time to meet with a finance specialist to review your options.

qaPairs.question: How do I sell or trade in my car?
qaPairs.answer: You can get an offer through our Sell My Car process, and a specialist can appraise your vehicle in person — share your ZIP and I'll schedule you at the nearest store.

qaPairs.question: Do you have a service center near me?
qaPairs.answer: We have AutoNation Service Centers in many locations — give me your ZIP and I'll help you find the closest one and book an appointment.

qaPairs.question: How much is an oil change?
qaPairs.answer: Oil change and standard maintenance pricing varies by vehicle and location, so I can't quote an exact price here — let me book you a service appointment for a precise estimate.

qaPairs.question: Do you offer mobile service?
qaPairs.answer: Yes, AutoNation Mobile Service brings maintenance and repairs to your home or office — share your ZIP and I'll help schedule a visit.

qaPairs.question: What's the cost of an extended warranty?
qaPairs.answer: Our Vehicle Protection Plans vary based on your vehicle and coverage level, so exact pricing comes from a specialist — I can arrange a consultation to review the right plan for you.

qaPairs.question: Do you do brake service?
qaPairs.answer: Yes, our service centers handle pad and rotor replacement, brake inspections, and fluid service, with pricing based on your vehicle — let's book a service appointment for an exact estimate.

qaPairs.question: Can you install new tires?
qaPairs.answer: We sell and install tires including mounting, balancing, and alignment add-ons — pricing depends on the tire and vehicle, so let me schedule you for a service appointment.

qaPairs.question: What brands do you carry?
qaPairs.answer: We sell across roughly 30 brands including Toyota, Honda, Ford, Chevrolet, BMW, and Mercedes-Benz — tell me what you're interested in and your ZIP, and I'll book a test drive.

qaPairs.question: What are your service center hours?
qaPairs.answer: Hours vary by location, so share your ZIP and I'll confirm the hours for your nearest AutoNation store while we get your appointment scheduled.

qaPairs.question: Do you handle collision repair?
qaPairs.answer: Yes, our Collision Centers handle body work, paint, and frame repair, often coordinated with insurance — let's set up a time for an estimate at the nearest center.

qaPairs.question: Can I schedule a test drive?
qaPairs.answer: Absolutely — just tell me the vehicle you're interested in and your ZIP, and I'll find a time that works for you at your local AutoNation store.

qaPairs.question: Do you offer auto insurance?
qaPairs.answer: Yes, AutoNation Insurance provides bundled quotes and policies through our partners — I can book you a consultation to get personalized rates.

smsPlaybook.goal: Qualify the customer's vehicle interest and budget, then book an in-person test drive with a sales specialist at their nearest AutoNation store.
smsPlaybook.offer: Ask about our current specials, including select models with payments under $300/mo and Certified Pre-Owned deals
qualifyingQuestions: Are you looking for a new, used, Certified Pre-Owned, or electric vehicle?
Do you have a specific make or model in mind, like a Toyota RAV4 or Ford F-150?
What's your target price range or monthly payment (under $300, $300–$450, or $450+)?
Will you be financing or paying cash, and are you interested in prequalification?
What's your ideal timeline to purchase?
What's your ZIP code so I can confirm the nearest AutoNation store and available inventory?

convo.text: Hi there! Thanks for calling AutoNation. I see you're interested in our certified pre-owned inventory under fifteen thousand. Are you looking to get behind the wheel of one of our vehicles today, or do you have questions about a specific model?
Yeah, I'm looking at that Toyota RAV4 you guys have listed. It's got good mileage and the price looks right. I'm just not sure if I can trade in my current vehicle or if I should sell it separately.

Perfect, the RAV4 is one of our most popular models, and we can absolutely help with a trade-in appraisal same day. Have you had a chance to check the vehicle's condition or mileage, and would you be available to visit one of our Phoenix area locations this week for a test drive and trade evaluation?

This week works for me, yeah. Probably Thursday or Friday after work. And no, I haven't seen it in person yet, so I'd definitely want to inspect it before committing. Do you guys offer any extended warranty coverage on certified cars?

Excellent! All our certified pre-owned vehicles come with our AutoNation CPO warranty, and we can discuss extended vehicle protection plans with you at the dealership. Let me get you connected with our Test Drive team in Phoenix—they'll confirm availability for Thursday or Friday, get your trade-in details locked in, and make sure that RAV4 is prepped and ready for your inspection. Sound good?

voiceRoutingDemo.routedSubtitle: AI Agent qualified caller intent and matched to the right team
